title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
summary: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.

title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
summary: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

title: Cava CEO: Unique Cuisine Differentiates Us
summary: Cava CEO Bret Schulman discusses the success of his restaurant and just what distinguishes them from the competition. He talks about the Mediterranean cuisine that distinguishes his brand. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AEW CEO on WWE Challenger’s Biggest Test in New York
summary: All Elite Wrestling CEO Tony Khan discusses the future of AEW. He discusses his upcoming event, and how he plans to promote his league in the future. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kash Patel-Linked Apparel Store Goes Dark After Pushing Crypto-Stealing Malware
SEC Delays Tokenized Stocks Innovation Exemption Amid Concerns: Bloomberg
summary: The SEC’s expected regulatory framework would have provided clarity for companies looking to tokenize traditional assets like stocks.

title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
summary: The bill would require quarterly public proof-of-reserve disclosures and third-party audits of government bitcoin holdings.

title: SEC delays tokenized asset exemption amid concerns over third-party tokens: Bloomberg Law
summary: The SEC has delayed its plan for an anticipated exemption that would clarify the agency's stance on tokenized assets, Bloomberg Law reported.

title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as Donald Trump’s US intelligence chief
summary: Departure comes as the president weighs whether to resume strikes on Iran

title: Jonathan Andic, the Mango heir turned homicide suspect
summary: The son of the fashion brand’s founder is being investigated for foul play in connection with his father’s death
